elementsAdapted: Dense, compact information layout with monospace metadata
Dark background with precise typographic hierarchy
Minimal chrome — content-forward UI with tight spacing
Keyboard-driven aesthetic: filter inputs prominent, minimal decoration
Single accent color for active/selected states

inspirationReferences.category: Distinct nav metaphors, layered paneling, premium dark
elementsAdapted: Recessed left rail navigation with distinct visual treatment
Layered panel depth using inset shadows (adapted as carved stone)
Split workspace view with tree + content panels
Premium material feel through depth and shadow work
Wide letter-spaced uppercase headings as design feature (etched/engraved feel)
Stone-texture CSS overlay using repeating gradients (no images)
Stat grid with oversized amber numbers as visual anchors
Entity blocks in schema planner styled as architectural tablets
Toggle switches and form controls as premium crafted elements

uniqueDesignElements: Carved/recessed depth model: all panels use inset box-shadow instead of elevation
Stone texture overlay: CSS-only repeating gradients at 4 angles simulating stone grain
Etched typography: letter-spacing 0.08-0.15em on all headings with light font weights
Amber ember accent: single warm color (#c89b3c) with glow effects for active states
Weathered radius: 2-4px corners that feel like worn stone edges, not brutalist or rounded
Monolithic density: compact spacing throughout, no whitespace padding, luxury watch energy
